brief_notes: Excellent numerical accuracy throughout. All benchmark numbers (EF1%=16.72 vs 11.9, 2x ROC enrichment factor), KLHDC2 campaign details (5.5B library, 80% synthesis, ~6M docked at 0.11%, 10 AL iterations, affinity improvement -6.81 to -12.43 kcal/mol, 29 synthesized, C29 IC50 ~3 uM, 7 total hits, 14% hit rate), NaV1.7 campaign details (4.1B library, ~4.5M docked at 0.11%, 7 iterations, -10.8 to -18.2 kcal/mol, 9 synthesized, 4 hits, 44.4% hit rate), and all IC50 values with CIs match extraction precisely. Writing is polished with strong campaign comparison table and detailed NaV1.7 IC50 table. Good citation coverage including relevant prior work. Overall excludes figures per rubric.
